sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الْأَبُ لِأَبْنَائِهِ: «الشَّجَرَةُ تُعْرَفُ مِنْ ثَمَرِهَا».
sentences.translation: Otac je čitao svojoj djeci: «Stablo se poznaje po plodu».
sentences.translationEn: The father read to his children: «The tree is known by its fruit».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّنَا نَعْرِفُ النَّاسَ مِنْ أَفْعَالِهِمْ لَا مِنْ كَلَامِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: To znači da ljude poznajemo po djelima a ne po riječima.
sentences.translationEn: This means that we know people by their actions not their words.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سَعِيدٌ يَتَكَلَّمُ كَثِيرًا عَنِ الْكَرَمِ.
sentences.translation: Said je puno govorio o velikodušnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Said used to talk a lot about generosity.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّهُ سَاعَدَ جَارَهُ بِالْفِعْلِ فَعَرَفَ النَّاسُ كَرَمَهُ الْحَقِيقِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Ali je zapravo pomogao komšiji pa su ljudi upoznali njegovu istinsku darežljivost.
sentences.translationEn: But he actually helped his neighbor and people knew his true generosity.
